title: Creating updates with rich text and attachments directly from Workforms
excerpt:
We need an ability to add attachments in the update field on Workforms

posts.author: chnlchl (Chloe Suico)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need an ability to add attachments in the update field on Workforms

Being able to create updates within a form is great! but it would be so much better if we could attach files and have rich text within the update field too.

Basically have the exact same update functionality like this:

image734×203 6.52 KB

Into workforms rather than just a text field that posts to updates.

This is the current update field:

image605×317 7.42 KB

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @chnlchl , I’m hanging for rich text too! I found this feature request to vote on : Rich text colum/form entry - Feature requests - monday Community Forum
